---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Research Papers and Articles"
description-meta: "Publications by Peter Kapec"
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 50
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  contents:
      - publications
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#publications}
:::
